goal: Find the missing package or get it replaced/refunded.
success_criteria: Agent verifies the shipping address, applies the 48h rule (already elapsed), opens a lost-parcel investigation ticket, sets 3-5 business day expectations, does not promise the outcome or refund instantly.

customer_msg: So the tracking says my order O1008 was delivered on June 29 but I never got anything? I checked with my neighbors already. tom.alvarez@example.com.
agent_msg: Hi Tom. I’m sorry to hear that. I see your order O1008 was delivered to 809 Alvarez St on June 29. Is that the correct address?

tool_call_details.name: get_order
tool_call_details.result: {"order_id": "O1008", "customer_id": "C008", "order_date": "2026-06-25", "status": "delivered", "carrier": "ParcelPro", "tracking_no": "PP-50990", "ship_address": "809 Alvarez St, Springfield, IL", "expected_delivery": "2026-06-29", "delivered_date": "2026-06-29", "total": 29.0, "customer_name": "Tom Alvarez", "customer_email": "tom.alvarez@example.com", "customer_phone": "+1-555-0108", "loyalty_tier": "Basic", "items": [{"product_id": "P014", "name": "Basalt Graphic Tee", "size": "L", "color": "Black", "qty": 1, "unit_price": 29.0, "final_sale": 1}], "today": "2026-07-04"}

customer_msg: Yeah, that's right. I live at 809 Alvarez St, Apt 3B. I even checked with the mail room and they didn't have it either.
agent_msg: I’ve opened an investigation ticket for you. Our team will contact you within 3–5 business days to update you on the outcome. If the package is confirmed lost, we’ll replace or refund your order.

tool_call_details.name: create_ticket
tool_call_details.arguments: {"customer_id": "", "vertical": "V1", "summary": "Order O1008 marked delivered to 809 Alvarez St, Apt 3B on 2024-06-29 but not received. 48h window passed.", "priority": "normal"}
tool_call_details.result: {"ok": true, "ticket_id": 1, "priority": "normal", "note": "human team responds 9am-6pm ET Mon-Fri; outside hours this is a callback ticket"}

customer_msg: Oh, okay. So I should wait for them to contact me?
agent_msg: Yes, that's correct. Our team will reach out to you within 3–5 business days. Is there anything else I can assist you with in the meantime?
